name: raycast-store-updates
title: Raycast Store Updates
description: Never miss new extensions or extension updates ever again!
author: chrismessina

preferences.name: trackReadStatus
preferences.title: Track Read/Unread Status
preferences.label: Enable
preferences.description: When enabled, items can be marked as read and hidden from the list

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Optional GitHub personal access token. The extension reads merged pull requests from the GitHub API to detect extension updates and removals; without a token this is capped at 60 requests/hour. A classic token with no scopes (public read only) raises the limit to 5,000 requests/hour. Create one at github.com/settings/tokens.

commands.name: view-store-updates
commands.title: View Store Updates
commands.subtitle: Raycast Store Updates
commands.description: See the latest Raycast store updates and new extensions

commands.name: store-updates-menu-bar
commands.title: Store Updates Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Raycast Store Updates
commands.description: Show new and updated Raycast Store extensions in the menu bar

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
